info.title: Warehouse Master & Catalog Service API
info.description: REST API for warehouse master data and catalog management including products, categories, brands, vendors, and clients

uomId.description: Unique identifier for the unit of measure

uomName.description: Full name of the unit of measure

uomCode.description: Short code identifier for the unit of measure

description.description: Detailed description of the unit of measure

isActive.description: Whether this unit of measure is currently active

UnitOfMeasure.description: Unit of measure entity for warehouse management

primaryUomId.description: ID of the primary unit of measure

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

requiresTemperatureControl.description: Whether the product requires temperature control

requiresLightControl.description: Whether the product requires light control

requiresHumidityControl.description: Whether the product requires humidity control

isHazardous.description: Whether the product is hazardous material

trackExpiry.description: Whether to track expiration dates for this product

abcAnalysisClass.description: ABC analysis classification (A, B, or C)

defaultCycleCountFrequencyDays.description: Default cycle count frequency in days

imageGalleryUrlsJson.description: JSON array of additional product image URLs

id.description: Unique identifier for the packaging hierarchy relationship

productId.description: ID of the product this packaging hierarchy applies to

parentUomId.description: ID of the parent unit of measure (higher level packaging)

childUomId.description: ID of the child unit of measure (lower level packaging)

quantityPerParent.description: Number of child units contained in one parent unit

ProductPackagingHierarchy.description: Product packaging hierarchy entity for warehouse management

productCategoryId.description: Unique identifier for the product category

parentCategoryId.description: ID of the parent category (null for root categories)

categoryName.description: Full name of the product category

categoryCode.description: Unique code identifier for the category

isActive.description: Whether this category is currently active

ProductCategory.description: Product category entity for warehouse management

productBrandId.description: Unique identifier for the product brand

brandCode.description: Unique code identifier for the brand

logoUrl.description: URL to the brand logo image

isActive.description: Whether this brand is currently active

ProductBrand.description: Product brand entity for warehouse management

packingMaterialId.description: Unique identifier for the packing material

materialCode.description: Unique code for the packing material

description.description: Detailed description of the packing material

length.description: Length of the packing material in its primary unit (e.g., cm for boxes)

width.description: Width of the packing material in its primary unit

height.description: Height of the packing material in its primary unit

weight.description: Weight of the packing material in kg

volume.description: Volume of the packing material in cubic meters

uomId.description: ID of the unit of measure for the material's dimensions/volume

standardCost.description: Standard cost of the packing material

currencyCode.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the cost

compatibleProductsJson.description: JSON array of product IDs compatible with this packing material

PackingMaterial.description: Packing material entity for warehouse management

id.description: Unique identifier for the client contact

clientId.description: ID of the client this contact belongs to

firstName.description: First name of the contact person

lastName.description: Last name of the contact person

jobTitle.description: Job title of the contact person

email.description: Email address of the contact person

phone.description: Phone number of the contact person

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary contact for the client

isActive.description: Whether this contact is currently active

ClientContact.description: Client contact entity for warehouse management

id.description: Unique identifier for the client address

clientId.description: ID of the client this address belongs to

addressLine1.description: First line of the street address

addressLine2.description: Second line of the street address (optional)

stateProvince.description: State or province of the address

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default address for the client

isActive.description: Whether this address is currently active

ClientAddress.description: Client address entity for warehouse management

categoryIds.description: List of global category IDs to copy to the tenant

items.description: List of global category IDs to copy to the tenant

CopyGlobalCategoriesRequest.description: Request to copy global categories to tenant
